title: MigrationPlan
description: NEW in v2. The computed execution plan derived from the InventoryGraph, Units, and RunRequest.strategy: the ordered waves of units, per-unit seam assignment, and dependency-respecting sequencing. Previously this ordering lived implicitly in charter.strategy.unitOrdering (a prose string) plus the unit graph; v2 makes it an explicit, machine-checkable artifact. Framework-neutral.

orderingPolicy.description: Human-readable summary of the ordering heuristic used (e.g. 'services-leaves-first, then shared primitives, then routes by traffic ascending risk').

waves.description: Ordered execution waves. Units within a wave have no unmet cross-wave dependencies and may proceed in parallel.

blockedBy.description: Dependency unit ids that must reach INTEGRATED/ACCEPTED or a live bridge first.

bridgePlan.description: Seams expected to exist during coexistence and the condition under which each is retired.

targetAdapter.description: Optional target-framework-specific planning hints (e.g. Angular2+ Module Federation remote boundaries, standalone-vs-module scaffolding choices).
